description_long: This is a dark, classical-style bust sculpture depicting a male figure with curly hair and defined facial features. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal base and is truncated at the chest and shoulders, with the arms not included. The surface appears matte and slightly weathered, with some visible dust or patina, suggesting age or outdoor exposure. There is a rectangular label or tag affixed to the back of the pedestal, possibly for identification or cataloging. The overall form is realistic, with careful attention to anatomical detail in the face and hair.
description: A dark, realistic bust of a curly-haired male figure on a round pedestal, with a matte, slightly weathered surface and a label on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and a visible rectangular label attached to the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the facial features, hair texture, and the curvature of the bust's shoulder.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the detailed face, chest, and the symmetrical form of the bust.
description_view_3: Right side profile focusing on the facial outline, ear, and the smooth transition from neck to shoulder.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is isolated and does not provide environmental context.
